description_long: This object is a compact, robust metal hanger clip, typically used for securing or suspending items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. It features a central rectangular body with a spring-loaded clasp mechanism on one end, allowing for quick attachment and release. On the opposite end, there is a solid circular ring, designed for threading through hooks, cables, or other mounting points. The surface is smooth and glossy, likely coated or polished for durability and corrosion resistance. The overall construction appears solid, with no visible seams or joints, suggesting it is manufactured for strength and reliability. Its size and form factor make it suitable for holding keys, tools, or signage in urban settings.
description: A sturdy, glossy metal hanger clip with a spring clasp on one end and a circular ring on the other, designed for secure attachment in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated rectangular body, spring clasp, and circular ring clearly.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular ring and the thickness of the central body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the rectangular body, clasp, and ring, with the clasp mechanism more visible.
description_view_3: View from the clasp end, showing the opening of the spring mechanism and the attachment point.
